title: Better Happy Ghasts – Fly & Ride
description: Reimagined Happy Ghasts that make flight and survival more interesting
body:
![Better Happy Ghasts TextLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1aadbd287f760d6fc2a4cc6b4908ea6ba38f07e.png)

# Overview
Better Happy Ghasts transforms the vanilla Happy Ghast into a more interactive, dynamic mob. This mod is designed to make flight, exploration, and survival in Minecraft more engaging, while introducing new mechanics, items, and challenges!

# Features
- Detailled features can be found in the Wiki: [Better Happy Ghasts Wiki](https://treflea4.gitbook.io/better-happy-ghasts/)
- Ride Happy Ghasts and use a sprint boost for +60% speed.
![Happy Ghast boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44fcb507b5bdf3b34a2d6212d463bb06daa3b092_0.webp)

- Wither Roses make Happy Ghasts withered (sad) and can drop Tears of Deep Sorrow.
![Withered Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c94d6c476cf28217a042aa0381627febed625b91_0.webp)

- Craft Fragments of Deep Sorrow and the Totem of the Weeping Sky.
  ![Craft Deep Sorrow Fragment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4651c27c90eb43c3fee1a1210b78f83d8c539a1b.png)
  ![Totem of The Weeping Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55988e68129dada55f1b2cad750e6484d173c3d.png)
- Totem grants death prevention, Elytra speed boost, and ghast riding bonuses.
- Happy Ghasts are attracted to jukeboxes playing *Amos Roddy – Tears*.
![Happy ghast listening to Amos Roddy – Tears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/098957326d6812d922b7943aa979fe365b7ecc5a_0.webp)

- Tears of Deep Sorrow can also be found in Bastions and Nether Fortress chests.
- Unlock advancements like *Ghast's Lament*, *Embrace of the Sky*, and *When the Wings Give Way*.
![Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81a8a1502ed3fad9469cf6d933c3648f843f1ecf.png)

# Credits
- **Mod developed by:** Flanbots
- **Icon designed by:** Meekanographie
